note: Curated GPU AI-compute specs, keyed by gfx/sm arch. Values are manufacturer spec-sheet figures with per-entry provenance (source + as_of) — johnny never computes or guesses these (the theoretical vector TFLOPS in `hinfo` is a separate, clearly-labelled computation). Matrix figures are for the reference full-die config (cu_ref compute units); johnny scales by detected CU count and marks the result approximate when it differs. `johnny hinfo --refresh-specs` re-pulls this seed.
